title: Tomophyllum hornei
taxonomy: Tomophyllum hornei is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is classified under the kingdom Plantae, which includes all other plants. Tomophyllum hornei is further classified under the division Pteridophyta, which comprises ferns. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, a group of ferns that have vascular tissue. The species is also classified under the order Polypodiales, which includes a diverse group of ferns.

intro: Tomophyllum hornei is a type of fern, specifically a species of the genus Tomophyllum, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
